narrative:
Tallmadge 4-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,147 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.7 percentage points.
